artifact_scope: QEMU-guest partial data-shape fault observations plus explicitly blocked performance and unexecuted family rows

rows.operation: capture per-helper guest elapsed nanoseconds during actual execution
rows.exact_boundary: Diagnostic elapsed observations only; they are not process CPU cost, a stable benchmark, an SLO, or comparator evidence.

rows.operation: measure process CPU cost under compiled policy with overload or refusal projection

observation.missing_evidence: only single-run guest elapsed diagnostics were captured; process CPU attribution, workload matrix, and refusal budgets remain missing

rows.exact_boundary: No performance or CPU-efficiency claim is permitted.

rows.operation: measure reads through the selected runtime path and caller-visible outcome

observation.missing_evidence: no mounted or storage-owner read-amplification workload was executed

rows.exact_boundary: Helper round trips do not measure mounted read amplification.

rows.operation: reconstruct one missing local EC helper shard
rows.exact_boundary: Local helper-only row; archive recall, pool receipts, distributed recovery, and degraded-read product visibility remain blocked.

rows.operation: recall or reconstruct archive media with degraded-visible result projection

observation.missing_evidence: no archive media or recall path was executed

rows.exact_boundary: The EC helper row cannot substitute for archive evidence.

rows.operation: reject a wrong in-memory helper key and tampered ciphertext
rows.exact_boundary: Wrong-key helper refusal is not key-epoch lifecycle, mounted encryption, cryptographic erase, or media-remanence proof.

rows.operation: bind active key epoch and refuse stale, retired, missing, or unauthorized epochs

observation.missing_evidence: no persisted key epoch or lifecycle state was exercised

rows.exact_boundary: Issue #1823 lifecycle authority remains outside this slice.

rows.operation: attempt cross-domain dedupe and preserve typed refusal

observation.missing_evidence: no runtime dedupe domain was exercised

rows.exact_boundary: Mounted dedupe and xfstests ownership remains outside this slice.

rows.operation: reject unknown-algorithm and truncated compression helper frames
rows.exact_boundary: This row covers compression helper frames only; encryption, coalescing, rebake, and mounted recovery frame faults remain incomplete.

rows.operation: reject wrong-width, wrong-index, wrong-role, and truncated local EC helper shard sets
rows.exact_boundary: Typed local helper refusal only; no EC placement, repair, archive, distributed recovery, or degraded-read product authority.

rows.operation: refuse one-of-three local EC helper input for a 2+1 profile
rows.exact_boundary: Local helper refusal only; archive media and distributed placement widths remain unexecuted.

rows.operation: refuse under-width archive media or expose allowed degraded state

observation.missing_evidence: no archive media, recall, or serving role was executed

rows.exact_boundary: EC helper under-width refusal cannot substitute for archive evidence.

rows.operation: inject split/replay, rollback, cutover, and source-retirement faults

observation.missing_evidence: no coalescing or rebake executor was exercised

rows.exact_boundary: Source-retirement and replacement-authority claims remain blocked.

non_claims: not a stable CPU or read-amplification benchmark
not a service objective or comparator row
not mounted, archive, distributed, production, or release evidence
claim_effect: Malformed compression and local EC shard-set refusals, wrong-key/tamper, and local EC under-width helper faults were executed, but CPU, read-amplification, key-epoch, dedupe-domain, archive, coalescing, and rebake rows keep this evidence class and claim blocked.
residual_risk: Elapsed guest timings are diagnostic observations without a stable CPU, workload, topology, or comparator baseline and are not a performance claim.
Read amplification, key epochs, illegal dedupe domains, archive recall, coalescing, and rebake remain unexecuted; malformed-frame coverage is limited to compression frames and local EC shard sets.
Local EC helper reconstruction and under-width refusal do not prove pool placement, distributed recovery, archive serving, degraded-read product safety, or availability.
